purpose: Turn the 2026-05-19 reusable audit findings into an ordered, evidence-bound repair roadmap.

currentTruth.productionReadinessStatus: blocked until fresh protected production evidence exists

priorityRoadmap.scope: Repair exchange and assistant source-of-truth claims
priorityRoadmap.output: AUD-01 and AUD-20 no longer overclaim current implementation truth.

priorityRoadmap.scope: Refresh production release gate before any production readiness claim
Promote production-safe proofs for historical-production audit families
priorityRoadmap.output: Fresh production-safe evidence or explicit blocked reason per family.
External review artifact or scheduled owner/date.

priorityRoadmap.scope: Deepen UX/a11y proof after UI changes
blocks: UI change scope or production-safe browser access
priorityRoadmap.output: Fresh responsive, keyboard, focus, and browser evidence.

priorityRoadmap.scope: Keep audit tooling and manifests current

workPackages.title: Exchange Architecture Truth Repair
workPackages.scope: Architecture, module, and audit-state wording for Binance + Gate.io implementation scope.
workPackages.doneWhen: AUD-01 no longer reports doc-consistency failure.

workPackages.title: Assistant Runtime Truth Repair
workPackages.scope: Assistant architecture, module docs, audit baseline, risk/register/matrix/module confidence truth narrowing.
validation: bot assistant config/dry-run e2e when claimed
workPackages.doneWhen: AUD-20 is no longer failed against a hot-path claim.

workPackages.title: Production Release Evidence Refresh
workPackages.scope: AUD-19 build-info, public smoke, protected runtime, rollback, backup/restore, and sign-off evidence.
workPackages.doneWhen: A new dated production release evidence packet replaces the historical production readiness claim.

workPackages.title: Production-Safe Evidence Refresh Queue
workPackages.scope: AUD-05, AUD-06, AUD-08, AUD-10, AUD-12, AUD-13, AUD-14, AUD-15, AUD-16, AUD-17, and AUD-18 production-safe evidence refreshes.
validation: production-safe family-specific proof command or blocked-reason artifact
workPackages.doneWhen: Each refreshed family records fresh production-safe evidence or a clear blocked reason.

workPackages.title: Security Governance Follow-Up
workPackages.doneWhen: AUD-06 governance gap has a dated review result or scheduled owner/date.

workPackages.title: UX/A11y Deepening
dependsOn: UI change scope or production-safe browser access
workPackages.scope: Responsive, keyboard, focus, empty/error/success states, and screenshot comparison where relevant.
blockers: UI change scope or production-safe browser access
workPackages.doneWhen: AUD-05 no longer relies on historical production UX proof for current UI claims.

workPackages.title: Mobile Activation Plan
dependsOn: explicit product decision to activate native/mobile scope
workPackages.scope: Mobile module docs, Expo/native validation commands, route/API parity expectations, and mobile confidence rows if activated.
validation: mobile remains explicitly deferred or activation plan is approved
workPackages.doneWhen: Mobile remains explicitly deferred or has a real activation plan.

workPackages.title: Audit Tooling Maintenance
workPackages.scope: Reusable audit tooling, manifests, rerun playbook, tooling index, and remediation plan validation.
workPackages.doneWhen: Manifest checks, rerun playbook checks, tooling index checks, remediation plan checks, and comparisons report no unexplained regressions.

currentBlockers: Fresh AUD-19 production readiness requires explicit production scope and approved auth/operator access.
LIVE or exchange-side mutation requires separate explicit approval.
Production readiness must not be claimed until fresh AUD-19 protected production evidence passes.
